FULL RUN pending (researcher gate).

WAYBACK TESTED — NO COMPANION RECIPE NEEDED (researcher asked whether the archive could push Azerbaijan back before 2010, since Ilham Aliyev has been president since 2003). Verdict: it cannot; the archive is a strict SUBSET of the live recipe. The speeches listing lives at /az/news/category/speeches but ARTICLES live at /az/articles/view/<id>, so a wayback harvest must use the article prefix (wayback_extend's default prefix, derived from start_urls[0], would point at the listing path and find nothing useful). CDX for president.az/az/articles/view*: 6000 captures, but only 212 match the article shape /az/articles/view/<id> — the rest is junk: 4292 are /az/articles/view/<id>/images/<n> and 1229 are /videos/<n> sub-pages. Those 212 article captures span only 2022-2024, entirely INSIDE the live recipe's 2010-2026 coverage. So wayback adds nothing. SECOND, STRUCTURAL PROBLEM even if it had depth: /az/articles/view/<id> carries NO category signal in the URL, so a wayback harvest could not be filtered to speeches — it would pull meetings, visits, receptions and interviews indiscriminately (the live recipe only filters to speeches because it crawls the category listing). Same failure mode as bgd_bss_president_wayback. PRE-2010 (2003-2010) is therefore not reachable this way; if wanted, it needs evidence that the site itself hosts pre-2010 articles at low ids, plus a way to identify which are speeches.
